# Newsroom
Welcome to Fujitsu’s Newsroom. Stay up-to-date with our cutting-edge technologies, global initiatives, and the stories that are shaping the future.
## Leading stories
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/pr/PressRoom/panel/pr-default-shakehand.jpg?rev=057ec5e27a6c43d3b2a9c05801deac66&hash=948AFDD5C63026B7796D8ED3D7452612)
June 17, 2026
[ Fujitsu and IBM Japan collaborate on modernization to support enterprise digital transformation ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/pr/news/2026/06/17-01)
Fujitsu Limited and IBM Japan, Ltd. today announced that they will accelerate their collaboration in the field of business system modernization in order to advance enterprise digital transformation and address challenges associated with legacy systems.
